description.short: Portola Grand Arabia Hotel places two travelers steps from Banda Aceh’s cultural heart—museums, mosques and tsunami memorials, plus lively markets and seafood-lined waterfronts. Relax by the outdoor pool, unwind with crafted cocktails at the bar or grab a bite at the on-site restaurant; food delivery and a cozy coffee shop add convenient choices. Guest rooms include air conditioning, complimentary Wi‑Fi, in-room safe and refreshing shower toiletries; select rooms offer city views for an energetic urban backdrop. Practical, well-located and comfortable for two travelers exploring the city. [Some content may be Generative AI assisted. Inaccuracies may occur.]

comments.responseText: Dear Mrs Tyara. Salam Hangat dari Portola Grand Arabia Hotel Banda Aceh. Sebelumnya kami ucapkan terima kasih banyak telah memilih Portola Grand Arabia Hotel Banda Aceh sebagai rumah kedua anda, Terima kasih karena telah meluangkan waktunya untuk menuliskan pengalaman selama menginap di hotel kami. Suatu kebanggan bagi kami karena anda memiliki pengalaman yang berkesan serta dapat menikmati suasana dan fasilitas hotel kami. Kami sangat berharap dengan kedatangan anda Kembali di Portola Grand Arabia Hotel Banda Aceh. Best Regards, Management. Suhaedi, General Manager Portola Grand Arabia Hotel Banda Aceh

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives:
Zimmer war nicht sauber (tote Insekten auf dem Boden, teilweise etwas "klebrig", Fenster nicht sauber, Geruch im Bad etc.), Jeder Punkt für sich genommen nicht schrecklich, aber ich hatte insgesamt einen höheren Standard in dem Hotel erwartet.
Frühstück tatsächlich unbrauchbar für Europäer (hatte in anderer Bewertung Ähnliches gelesen, aber bin davon ausgegangen dass ich als experimentierfreudiger Mensch hier trotzdem fündig werde). Personal ist nicht negativ aufgefallen, aber auch definitiv nicht besonders freundlich.
comments.reviewPositives: Sehr gute und praktische Lage, z.B. sind große Moschee und Tsunami-Museum fußläufig sehr gut erreichbar. Gemütliche Betten.

comments.reviewComments: The location is very strategic, everything is close by. The room is quite spacious, but it lacks attention to interior maintenance. There are some damaged properties that have not been repaired, such as a chair with peeling leather, the bathroom door is a bit rotten at the bottom, and the wallpaper is peeling. Other than that, it's good.

comments.reviewNegatives:
It felt like the hotel was a couple of years past its prime. E.g. you could see the wooden bathroom door frame was already falling apart.
Breakfast was a bit of a challenge for our European stomach, which is less of a complaint as an information to those choosing between hotel options (as we are very aware that we are not the main target audience for this hotel - there's few European tourists in Banda Aceh in general).
comments.reviewPositives:
The hotel is located very centrally in Medan and certainly one of the up-scale hotels in the city. We stayed overnight before heading on to Pulau Weh. Due to a bus delay, we checked in very late at night, which was not a problem due to 24/7 reception. Communication ahead of time was quick.
Please be advised that a sign at the entrance will inform you that this is a Sharia Hotel - for Western Tourists like us there seemed to be no specific expectation related to this, but we would recommend dressing respectfully when going to breakfast etc. (like most anywhere in Aceh actually).

comments.reviewPositives:
Good enough if .... 

All is good especially the location except for 4 things. It is convenient for guests who want to be close to the main attractions. Unfortunately we had to change rooms due to bad smell in the room that may have been caused by previous guests smoking in the bathroom or dampness or both. Secondly I specifically asked before booking about the internet connection, whether it is strong enough for an online meeting and the answer was yes, however I found out that it wasn't strong enough. Thirdly, the phones in the rooms were not working and no one explained about it. We were trying to get hold of room service and reception for ages before going down to ask what's wrong with it. Finally, I think guests should have priority parking over visitors of their restaurants. There's a night that we had to park at a paid parking opposite the hotel because it was full.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
My friends and I (both are ladies).

When we first arrived in front of the hotel, a man approached and took our luggage and bring inside. We were welcomed with drinks and smile. Such a gentle gesture from your staff. 

We checked in at the frontdesk, the receptionist is very nice. We were taken to our room at Level 2. Oh my. In my mind, is this 3 star hotel? Kind of 4 star. 

We took Deluxe Twin Room with affordable price (it was), around 170MYR/for two (1,800,000 rupiah), since it included breakfast (we took it to experience local foods).

The experience in this hotel is splendid and amazing. If you come to Acheh, I would recommend Portola Grand Arabia Hotel!

After complained, found out the toilet body wash, shampoo and conditioner bottles were still empty. The hair dryer was sort of exploded when i used it.  No words to describe on how terrible my stay this time.
